summary: STAGEPASS Preview App (Download Portal) testing completed. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. This is a React + FastAPI portal for downloading the STAGEPASS production zip file.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/feed returns 3 mock feed items with correct structure
Backend: /api/chat responds to messages (Gemini AI integration working)
Backend: /api/auth/login with demo@stagepass.com / demo123 returns token
Frontend: Home page loads with 'STAGEPASS PRODUCTION PACKAGE' heading
Frontend: Production Build Ready badge visible
Frontend: Download button with data-testid='download-zip-btn' present and functional
Frontend: 8 feature cards displayed (Auth System, Profile Page, Radio Overhaul, Live Streaming, Landing Page, AI Butler, PWA Ready, Multi-Quality ABR)
Frontend: Bug Fixes section with 8 items listed
Frontend: Architecture diagram showing stagepass folder structure
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats (Total Views: 45.2K, Revenue: $12,400, Watch Time: 1,200h)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Recent Content, System Status, AI Assistant sections
Frontend: Navigation between pages (Feed, Dashboard, Radio, Live, Community) works
Frontend: Download button shows 'Downloading...' state when clicked
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: /api/feed returns hardcoded data, /api/auth/login only accepts demo credentials
Minor: Dashboard shows same 'Neon Nights: Live Set' content 3 times in Recent Content - could diversify mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration tested the React + FastAPI preview app which is a download portal for STAGEPASS production code. All APIs work correctly. The actual STAGEPASS production code (Next.js + Express.js + Firebase) is in /app/stagepass/ and gets zipped into stagepass_production.zip. Previous iterations (1 and 2) tested the STAGEPASS Next.js app directly.
